title: Oscars 2026: The Full Winners List
text: According to The Hollywood Reporter's coverage of the 98th Academy Awards held on March 15, 2026, Amy Madigan won the Oscar for Best Supporting Actress for her role in Weapons. The Best Supporting Actress nominees were: Elle Fanning in Sentimental Value, Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas in Sentimental Value, Amy Madigan in Weapons (WINNER), Wunmi Mosaku in Sinners, and Teyana Taylor in One Battle After Another. Madigan's win came in a competitive year where several major films were represented in the category. One Battle After Another and Sinners dominated the evening overall, with the former securing six total awards including Best Picture and Best Director for Paul Thomas Anderson.
